heroDescription: Explore GLM image and audio models on Novita AI for text-to-image generation, text-to-speech, voice cloning, and speech-to-text transcription.
seoDescription: Explore GLM AI models on Novita AI. Compare GLM image generation, text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio-to-text model pages for API integration.
overviewBody: GLM is a model family from Z.AI covering image generation, speech synthesis, speech recognition, and broader language and vision-language models.
On Novita AI, this collection focuses on the currently enabled GLM multimodal APIs: GLM Image Generation, GLM Text to Speech, GLM Voice Clone, and GLM Audio to Text.
Use this page to compare GLM generation and audio endpoints, then open a dedicated model page to review API behavior, pricing, and Playground access.

lineupSections.title: GLM image generation
lineupSections.description: GLM Image Generation supports prompt-following image creation for structured layouts, posters, diagrams, and text-rich visuals.
items: Use GLM Image Generation for posters, diagrams, social graphics, and knowledge-heavy visuals.
Official Z.AI docs describe GLM-Image as a hybrid autoregressive plus diffusion-decoder architecture.
Open the model page to confirm Novita-specific request parameters, supported sizes, and pricing.

lineupSections.title: GLM speech generation
lineupSections.description: GLM audio generation models cover direct text-to-speech and sample-based voice cloning for custom voice workflows.
items: Use GLM Text to Speech for natural speech generation with voice, speed, volume, and output-format controls.
Use GLM Voice Clone when a sample audio clip should define the target voice timbre.

lineupSections.title: GLM speech recognition
lineupSections.description: GLM Audio to Text uses GLM ASR for multilingual speech transcription and hotword-guided recognition.
items: Use GLM Audio to Text for transcription, meeting notes, captions, and voice-input workflows.
Novita supports audio input with prompt context and hotword guidance.

faq.question: What GLM models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The current GLM collection includes GLM Image Generation, GLM Text to Speech, GLM Voice Clone, and GLM Audio to Text.

faq.question: Which GLM model should I use for speech workflows?
faq.answer: Use GLM Text to Speech to synthesize speech from text, GLM Voice Clone to create speech with a specified voice timbre from sample audio, and GLM Audio to Text to transcribe audio into text.

faq.question: Are GLM language models part of this collection?
faq.answer: This collection follows the enabled multimodal GLM configuration and focuses on image and audio models rather than GLM language or vision-language chat models.

models.name: glm-image
models.description: Generate images with GLM Image for prompt-following, text-rich graphics, posters, diagrams, and structured visual layouts.

models.name: glm-tts-clone
models.description: Create speech with a specified voice timbre from sample audio and target text using GLM voice cloning.

models.name: glm-asr
models.description: Transcribe audio into text with GLM ASR, supporting multilingual transcription and hotword guidance.

models.name: glm-tts
models.description: Convert text into natural speech with GLM TTS, including voice, speed, volume, and output-format controls.
